projectDescription: A Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 microservices ecosystem featuring JWT authentication, hexagonal architecture, event-driven messaging (RabbitMQ/Kafka), distributed tracing (Zipkin), and centralized logging (ELK stack), deployable via Docker Compose or manually.
keyFeatures: Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 Maven multi-module project
JWT authentication with BCrypt password hashing (HS384)
Spring Cloud Gateway as OAuth2 Resource Server
Eureka service discovery with centralized config server
Event-driven messaging with RabbitMQ and Apache Kafka (switchable via Spring Profiles)
Distributed tracing with Zipkin and Micrometer Tracing
Centralized log aggregation with ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana)
Full Docker Compose orchestration with health checks and profiles
H2 in-memory databases per service for development
publicApiSurface: POST /auth/login — Authenticate and receive JWT token
GET /api/inventory/products/{id} — Get product by ID (JWT required)
POST /api/inventory/products — Create product, publishes async event (JWT required)
GET /actuator/health — Health check for each service
GET http://localhost:8761 — Eureka service registry dashboard
GET http://localhost:9411 — Zipkin distributed tracing UI
GET http://localhost:5601 — Kibana log visualization UI
